title: Santiago Tarta
description: A classic Spanish dessert made with a buttery crust, a rich mascarpone filling, and a touch of wholesome Santiago ingredients.
instructions: Roll out the buttery pastry dough and place it in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mascarpone cheese, sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and tarta cinnamon.
Pour the mascarpone mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Sprinkle the wholesome Santiago almonds over the top of the mascarpone mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional almonds if desired.
